seed_instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area.
org_constraint: Capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase.
new_constraint: Write the review entirely in uppercase.
instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. Write the review entirely in uppercase.
response:
i recently visited the newly opened coffee shop, THE DAILY GRIND, and i have to say, it was a delightful experience. the atmosphere is incredibly cozy, with warm lighting and comfortable seating perfect for reading or catching up with friends. the aroma alone is enough to make you want to stay all day.

i ordered their signature latte, and it was absolutely superb. the espresso was rich and perfectly pulled, and the milk was steamed to a velvety perfection. they also have a fantastic selection of pastries; i tried a croissant, and it was flaky and buttery to perfection.

the staff at THE DAILY GRIND were exceptionally friendly and attentive, making the whole visit feel welcoming. while it's still new, it has the potential to become my new favorite spot. i highly recommend stopping by if you're in the area!<turn|>
